name: Pro Shooter
author: Poki
description: Pro Shooter is an intense shooting game that puts you in the shoes of a skilled hitman on high-stakes missions! Track down dangerous enemies, line up the perfect shot, and eliminate your targets with deadly precision. Every mission tests your accuracy, strategy, and reflexes, pushing your sniper skills to the limit. Gear up with powerful weapons and dive into the thrilling world of assassins. Ready to prove you’re the ultimate pro? How to play Pro Shooter? Click and hold to aim, release to shoot. Who created Pro Shooter? Pro Shooter is created by GeniGames. Play their other games on Poki: I Am Hall Security , Flying Wheels Evolution and Perfect Landing, Plane Pilot ! How can I play Pro Shooter for free? You can play Pro Shooter for free on Poki. Can I play Pro Shooter on mobile devices and desktop? Pro Shooter can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
